# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/arm64-v8a/SDL_image
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Value Computed by CMake

AOM_CXX_FLAGS:STRING= -std=c++11 -Wall -Wdisabled-optimization -Wextra -Wextra-semi -Wextra-semi-stmt -Wfloat-conversion -Wformat=2 -Wpointer-arith -Wshorten-64-to-32 -Wsign-compare -Wstring-conversion -Wtype-limits -Wuninitialized -Wunused -Wvla -Wc++14-extensions -Wc++17-extensions -Wc++20-extensions -U_FORTIFY_SOURCE -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=0 -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64

AOM_CXX_PASSED_TESTS:STRING= inline_check_1 unistd_check

AOM_C_FLAGS:STRING= -std=c99 -Wall -Wdisabled-optimization -Wextra -Wextra-semi -Wextra-semi-stmt -Wfloat-conversion -Wformat=2 -Wimplicit-function-declaration -Wpointer-arith -Wshorten-64-to-32 -Wsign-compare -Wstring-conversion -Wtype-limits -Wuninitialized -Wunused -Wvla -Wshadow -Wundef -U_FORTIFY_SOURCE -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=0 -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64

//Build avif C++ tests, which depend on GoogleTest. Requires GoogleTest.

AVIF_ENABLE_GTEST:BOOL=ON

//Treat all compiler warnings as errors
AVIF_ENABLE_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//Build the AOM codec by providing your own copy of the repo in

CONFIG_ACCOUNTING:STRING=0

//Enables bit stream analyzer.
CONFIG_ANALYZER:STRING=0

CONFIG_AV1_ENCODER:BOOL=1

//Build with high bitdepth support.
CONFIG_AV1_HIGHBITDEPTH:STRING=1

//Build with temporal denoising support.
CONFIG_AV1_TEMPORAL_DENOISING:STRING=0

//Internal flag.
CONFIG_BIG_ENDIAN:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: Improve bitrate accuracy.
CONFIG_BITRATE_ACCURACY:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: Baseline of improve bitrate accuracy experiment.
CONFIG_BITRATE_ACCURACY_BL:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: Bitstream debugging.
CONFIG_BITSTREAM_DEBUG:STRING=0

//Coefficient range check.
CONFIG_COEFFICIENT_RANGE_CHECKING:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: Collect encoding component timing information.
CONFIG_COLLECT_COMPONENT_TIMING:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: Collect partition timing stats. Can be 1 or 2.
CONFIG_COLLECT_PARTITION_STATS:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment.
CONFIG_COLLECT_RD_STATS:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: Support for 7.x and 8.x levels.
CONFIG_CWG_C013:STRING=0

//Enable debug-only code.
CONFIG_DEBUG:STRING=0

//Denoise/noise modeling support in encoder.
CONFIG_DENOISE:STRING=1

//AV1 experiment: Disable full_pixel_motion_search_based_split
// on BLOCK_8X8.
CONFIG_DISABLE_FULL_PIXEL_SPLIT_8X8:STRING=1

CONFIG_ENTROPY_STATS:STRING=0

CONFIG_FPMT_TEST:STRING=0

CONFIG_GCC:STRING=0

//Enable gprof support.
CONFIG_GPROF:STRING=0

//Enables bitstream inspection.
CONFIG_INSPECTION:STRING=0

//Enables internal encoder stats.
CONFIG_INTERNAL_STATS:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment.
CONFIG_INTER_STATS_ONLY:STRING=0

//Enables libyuv scaling/conversion support.
CONFIG_LIBYUV:STRING=1

//Max profile to support decoding.
CONFIG_MAX_DECODE_PROFILE:STRING=2

//Mismatch debugging flag.
CONFIG_MISMATCH_DEBUG:STRING=0

//Multithread support.
CONFIG_MULTITHREAD:STRING=1

//AV1 experiment: Fully-connected neural nets ver.2.
CONFIG_NN_V2:STRING=0

//Only enables general decoding (disables large scale tile decoding).
CONFIG_NORMAL_TILE_MODE:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: for optical flow API.
CONFIG_OPTICAL_FLOW_API:STRING=0

//Internal flag.
CONFIG_OS_SUPPORT:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: Use alternative partition search order.
CONFIG_PARTITION_SEARCH_ORDER:STRING=0

//Build with PIC enabled.

//AV1 experiment: Log rate control decision.
CONFIG_RATECTRL_LOG:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: Use external rdmult and q_index.
CONFIG_RD_COMMAND:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment.
CONFIG_RD_DEBUG:STRING=0

//Build for RTC-only. See aomcx.h for all disabled features.
CONFIG_REALTIME_ONLY:STRING=0

//AV1 experiment: Build with ML-based partitioning for Real Time.
CONFIG_RT_ML_PARTITIONING:STRING=0

//Runtime CPU detection support.

//Build shared libs.
CONFIG_SHARED:STRING=0

CONFIG_SIZE_LIMIT:STRING=0

//Enables unit tests.

ENABLE_TOOLS:BOOL=OFF

//Enables VSX optimizations on PowerPC targets.
ENABLE_VSX:BOOL=ON

//Converts warnings to errors at compile time.
ENABLE_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//Force high bitdepth decoding pipeline on 8-bit input.
FORCE_HIGHBITDEPTH_DECODING:STRING=0

//Git command line client
GIT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for GLUT.
GLUT_DIR:PATH=GLUT_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a file.
GLUT_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=GLUT_INCLUDE_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
GLUT_Xi_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=GLUT_Xi_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
GLUT_Xmu_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=GLUT_Xmu_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
GLUT_glut_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=GLUT_glut_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Git.
Git_DIR:PATH=Git_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Enables Arm CRC32 optimizations.
HAVE_ARM_CRC32:STRING=0

//Enables AVX optimizations.
HAVE_AVX:STRING=0

//Enables AVX2 optimizations.
HAVE_AVX2:STRING=0

//Internal flag, GNU fenv.h present for target.
HAVE_FEXCEPT:STRING=0

//Enables MMX optimizations. 
HAVE_MMX:STRING=0

//Enables NEON intrinsics optimizations.
HAVE_NEON:STRING=0

//Internal flag, target pthread support.
HAVE_PTHREAD_H:STRING=0

//Enables SSE optimizations.
HAVE_SSE:STRING=0

//Enables SSE2 optimizations.
HAVE_SSE2:STRING=0

//Enables SSE3 optimizations.
HAVE_SSE3:STRING=0

//Enables SSE 4.1 optimizations.
HAVE_SSE4_1:STRING=0

//Enables SSE 4.2 optimizations.
HAVE_SSE4_2:STRING=0

//Enables SSSE3 optimizations.
HAVE_SSSE3:STRING=0

//Enables VSX optimizations.
HAVE_VSX:STRING=0

//WxWidgets present.
HAVE_WXWIDGETS:STRING=0

//Sets INLINE value for current target.
INLINE:STRING=

//Installation directory for executables
INSTALL_BIN_DIR:PATH=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-install/arm64-v8a/SDL_image/bin

//Installation directory for headers
INSTALL_INC_DIR:PATH=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-install/arm64-v8a/SDL_image/include

//Build libpng as a framework bundle (not available on this platform)

// for libpng

//Build the libpng tools

//Support loading ANI animations
SDLIMAGE_ANI:BOOL=ON

//Add ANI save support
SDLIMAGE_ANI_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//Support loading AVIF images
SDLIMAGE_AVIF:BOOL=ON

//Add AVIF save support
SDLIMAGE_AVIF_SAVE:BOOL=ON

SDLIMAGE_AVIF_SHARED:BOOL=OFF

//Use stb_image for loading JPEG files
SDLIMAGE_BACKEND_STB:BOOL=ON

//Support loading BMP images
SDLIMAGE_BMP:BOOL=ON

//Add BMP save support
SDLIMAGE_BMP_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//Load dependencies dynamically
SDLIMAGE_DEPS_SHARED:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading GIF images
SDLIMAGE_GIF:BOOL=ON

//Add GIF save support
SDLIMAGE_GIF_SAVE:BOOL=ON

SDLIMAGE_INSTALL:BOOL=ON

// (SDL3_image subfolder for MSVC projects)

//Install man pages for SDL3_image
SDLIMAGE_INSTALL_MAN:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading JPEG images
SDLIMAGE_JPG:BOOL=ON

//Add JPEG save support

//Support loading JXL images
SDLIMAGE_JXL:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading LBM images
SDLIMAGE_LBM:BOOL=ON

//Support loading PCX images
SDLIMAGE_PCX:BOOL=ON

//Support loading PNG images
SDLIMAGE_PNG:BOOL=ON

//Support loading PNGs using libpng (useful for APNGs)
SDLIMAGE_PNG_LIBPNG:BOOL=ON

//Add PNG save support
SDLIMAGE_PNG_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//Dynamically load PNG support (requires shared libpng)
SDLIMAGE_PNG_SHARED:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading PNM images
SDLIMAGE_PNM:BOOL=ON

//Support loading QOI images
SDLIMAGE_QOI:BOOL=ON

//Create relocatable SDL_image package
SDLIMAGE_RELOCATABLE:BOOL=OFF

//Build the SDL3_image sample program(s)
SDLIMAGE_SAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Fail when a dependency could not be found
SDLIMAGE_STRICT:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading SVG images
SDLIMAGE_SVG:BOOL=ON

//Build unit tests?
SDLIMAGE_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Install unit tests?
SDLIMAGE_TESTS_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading TGA images
SDLIMAGE_TGA:BOOL=ON

//Add TGA save support
SDLIMAGE_TGA_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//Support loading TIFF images
SDLIMAGE_TIF:BOOL=ON

//Dynamically load TIFF support (requires shared libtiff)
SDLIMAGE_TIF_SHARED:BOOL=OFF

//Use vendored third-party libraries
SDLIMAGE_VENDORED:BOOL=ON

//Support loading WEBP images
SDLIMAGE_WEBP:BOOL=OFF

//Treat warnings as errors
SDLIMAGE_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading XCF images
SDLIMAGE_XCF:BOOL=ON

//Support loading XPM images
SDLIMAGE_XPM:BOOL=ON

//Support loading XV images
SDLIMAGE_XV:BOOL=ON

//Detected architecture X86

TIFF_DEFAULT_STRIP_SIZE:STRING=8192

//Path to a library.
ZSTD_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=ZSTD_LIBRARY_RELEASE-NOTFOUND

//support for CCITT Group 3 & 4 algorithms
ccitt:BOOL=ON

//enable picking up YCbCr subsampling info from the JPEG data stream
// to support files lacking the tag
check-ycbcr-subsampling:BOOL=ON

//enable reading large strips in chunks for TIFFReadScanline()
// (experimental)
chunky-strip-read:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
dav1d_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/arm64-v8a/SDL_image/external/dav1d-build

//Value Computed by CMake
dav1d_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
dav1d_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_image/external/dav1d

//enable deferred strip/tile offset/size loading (also available
// at runtime with the 'D' flag of TIFFOpen())
defer-strile-load:BOOL=OFF

//Enable extra compiler warnings
extra-warnings:BOOL=OFF

//the RGBA interface will treat a fourth sample with no EXTRASAMPLE_
// value as being ASSOCALPHA. Many packages produce RGBA files
// but don't mark the alpha properly
extrasample-as-alpha:BOOL=ON

//Compiler warnings are errors
fatal-warnings:BOOL=OFF

//use ISO JBIG compression (requires JBIT-KIT library)
jbig:BOOL=OFF

//use libjpeg (required for JPEG compression)
jpeg:BOOL=OFF

//enable libjpeg 8/12-bit dual mode (requires separate 12-bit libjpeg
// build)
jpeg12:BOOL=OFF

//Enable linker version script
ld-version-script:BOOL=ON

//use libLerc (required for LERC compression)
lerc:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
libavif_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/arm64-v8a/SDL_image/external/libavif-build

//Value Computed by CMake
libavif_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_image/external/libavif

//use libdeflate (optional for faster Deflate support, still requires
// zlib)
libdeflate:BOOL=OFF

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for liblzma.
liblzma_DIR:PATH=liblzma_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Value Computed by CMake

//Value Computed by CMake
libpng_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
libpng_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_image/external/libpng

//support for LogLuv high dynamic range algorithm
logluv:BOOL=ON

//use liblzma (required for LZMA2 compression)
lzma:BOOL=OFF

//support for LZW algorithm
lzw:BOOL=ON

//support for Microsoft Document Imaging
mdi:BOOL=ON

//support for NeXT 2-bit RLE algorithm
next:BOOL=ON

//support for Old JPEG compression (read-only)
old-jpeg:BOOL=OFF

//support for Macintosh PackBits algorithm
packbits:BOOL=ON

//support for Pixar log-format algorithm (requires Zlib)
pixarlog:BOOL=OFF

//strip chopping (whether or not to convert single-strip uncompressed
// images to mutiple strips of specified size to reduce memory
// usage)
strip-chopping:BOOL=ON

//support for ThunderScan 4-bit RLE algorithm
thunder:BOOL=ON

//build TIFF contrib
tiff-contrib:BOOL=OFF

//Enable C++ stream API building (requires C++ compiler)
tiff-cxx:BOOL=OFF

//build TIFF deprecated features
tiff-deprecated:BOOL=OFF

//build TIFF documentation
tiff-docs:BOOL=OFF

//install TIFF targets
tiff-install:BOOL=OFF

//use OpenGL (required for tiffgt viewer)
tiff-opengl:BOOL=OFF

//build TIFF static libraries
tiff-static:BOOL=ON

//build TIFF tests
tiff-tests:BOOL=OFF

//build TIFF tools
tiff-tools:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
tiff_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/arm64-v8a/SDL_image/external/libtiff-build

//Value Computed by CMake
tiff_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Dependencies for the target
tiff_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-android/24/libm.so;

//Value Computed by CMake
tiff_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_image/external/libtiff

webp:BOOL=OFF

//Use Win32 I/O
win32-io:BOOL=OFF

//use zlib (required for Deflate compression)
zlib:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
zlib_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/arm64-v8a/SDL_image/external/zlib-build

//Value Computed by CMake
zlib_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
zlib_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_image/external/zlib

//use libzstd (required for ZSTD compression)
zstd:BOOL=OFF
